chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text:
Unless specifically provided otherwise, a provision of this chapter that applies to a person operating a bicycle applies only to a person operating a bicycle on:

(1) a highway; or

(2) a path set aside for the exclusive operation of bicycles.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.001 — Applicability

Unless specifically provided otherwise, a provision of this chapter that applies to a person operating a bicycle applies only to a person operating a bicycle on:

    (1) a highway; or

    (2) a path set aside for the exclusive operation of bicycles.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 485 (H.B.2188), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: Unless specifically provided otherwise, a provision of this chapter that applies to a person operating a bicycle applies only to a person operating a bicycle on:
a path set aside for the exclusive operation of bicycles.
